caption: A man with a large, spiked, silver-grey wig and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and black headphones. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous small, framed photographs and a shelving unit holding various items, including a yellow garment with the word "LEE" visible. To the man's right, on-screen graphics feature a logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101" alongside the word "PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking with slight variations in his facial expressions and mouth movements, while his head tilts slightly. The lighting and background remain static throughout the scene, focusing the action on the man's delivery during the recording.
